description: SPB runtime file mirror list. Root-level files are the source of truth; they are copied into every entry in `targets`. See scripts/README.md and scripts/RUNTIME_SYNC.md. 2026-04-21 HEENAN OVERNIGHT post-Codex-audit: extended to include the 4 hot-path Python modules that were previously only mirrored at Electron build time via electron-app/copy-server-assets.js. The Codex audit of the overnight loop found that Python backend edits did not reach the Electron runtime per-edit, only per-build; this manifest now covers both paths so `node scripts/sync-runtime-copies.js --write` catches them. 2026-04-22 HEENAN FAMILY overnight iter 4 (Foundation trust): added engine/base_registry_data.py so Foundation-Base metadata edits at root auto-sync to Electron mirrors (previously only copied at build-time, caused recurrent drift).
